═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    IRON WINGS - WWII Flight Simulator
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

A free IL-2 Sturmovik style flight simulator for Windows.

REQUIREMENTS:
─────────────
• Windows 10 or later
• Python 3.8 or later (if using launcher)
• Graphics card with OpenGL support

INSTALLATION OPTIONS:
────────────────────

OPTION 1 - With Python installed:
  1. Install Python 3.8+ from https://python.org
  2. Double-click IronWings.bat

OPTION 2 - Portable version:
  1. Install Python 3.8+ 
  2. Create a virtual environment:
     python -m venv venv
  3. Activate it and install Panda3D:
     venv\Scripts\activate
     pip install panda3d
  4. Copy your game files
  5. Run: venv\Scripts\python main.py

CONTROLS:
─────────
  W / S         Pitch up / down
  A / D         Roll left / right
  Q / E         Yaw left / right
  Shift         Increase throttle
  Ctrl          Decrease throttle
  Space         Air brake
  R             Reset position
  ESC           Quit

FLIGHT CHARACTERISTICS:
──────────────────────
  Max Speed:     720 km/h
  Cruise Speed:  360 km/h
  Stall Speed:   180 km/h
  Max Altitude:  8000 m

FILES:
──────
  main.py        Game source code
  IronWings      Linux executable (for reference)
  IronWings.bat  Windows launcher
  
For the complete game, download from GitHub:
https://github.com/nnkrupnov-art/iron-wings-panda3d

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
